patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -7,8 +7,8 @@
 #define I2C_TIMEOUT_DEFAULT_MS   100U
 #define I2C_ADDR_10BIT_FLAG      0x8000U
 
-/* Timeout expressed in milliseconds as uint16_t */
-#define I2C_MAKE_TIMEOUT(ms)     ((uint16_t)(ms))
+/* BREAKING: Timeout macro now returns microseconds as uint32_t */
+#define I2C_MAKE_TIMEOUT(ms)     ((uint32_t)(ms) * 1000U)
 
 typedef struct {
     uint8_t  bus;
